chapter_title.en: The Reward of one who Feeds a Believer, Quenches his Thirst, Clothes him or Pays off his Debt

text: 170 - وعن أبي جعفر عليه السلام أنه قال: إطعام مسلم يعدل عتق نسمة.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 170. It has been narrated that Abu Ja'far (a.s) said: Feeding a Muslim is equal to freeing a human being.
